statement: Reviewed the NOTED frontend privacy assault vault entry and WHY_NOT_TO_TRUST short-index addition across this full session: original candidate audit (7-question review), whitespace fix, rebase onto current main, and full gate re-verification (nexus doctor, 190 tests, nexus verify) on this exact commit. Understand this documents already-existing, unpatched vulnerabilities in the Noted product (disposition FOLLOW_UP_REQUIRED, no fix included) and accept the timing/disclosure tradeoff of publishing this report before a fix ships. Authorize merging this exact commit into main.
non_claims: This authorization covers only commit e28334598a149eb4c085c4c64b3cab110cf4013b; any new substantive commit requires a new authorization file.
This does not certify the vault report's content is complete or exhaustive — only that the operator reviewed it and the verification results, and accepts merging this exact commit.
